## Bug Summary

<!-- Describe the bug, expected behavior, and actual behavior. -->

## Impact

- What is broken?
- Who or what is affected?
- Is this blocking an API change, client generation?

## Changes Needed

<!-- Describe what should be changed or fixed to resolve this bug. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Affects API?
- [ ] Spec updated?
- [ ] Generated code refreshed with `./api/scripts/gen-all.sh` if the spec changed?

## Notes

- Link related issue or PRs here.
- Include any reproduction steps, logs, or screenshots if useful.
